summary.zh: 这是一个面向 Claude Code 的技能集合仓库，提供 DNS 管理和 VPS 运维的自动化工具。支持 Cloudflare、腾讯云、阿里云三大主流 DNS 服务商的 API 操作，可实现动态 DNS 更新、批量域名管理和 VPS 状态监控、批量命令执行等运维功能，适用于多服务器集中管理和自动化部署场景。
summary.en: A Claude Code skills collection for DNS management and VPS operations automation. Supports API operations for Cloudflare, Tencent Cloud, and Aliyun with features including dynamic DNS updates, batch domain management, VPS monitoring, and batch command execution across multiple servers for streamlined DevOps workflows.

summary.zh: Litter 是一款原生 iOS + Android 客户端，用于连接和操控 Mac 上的 Codex AI 编程助手。通过 SSH/Bonjour/Tailscale 实现局域网发现与远程连接，支持暗色/亮色模式及无障碍访问选项。采用 Rust 桥接层实现跨平台共享逻辑，是移动端访问 Codex 的轻量级解决方案。
summary.en: Litter is a native iOS + Android client for Codex AI coding assistant running on Mac. It enables remote connection via SSH/Bonjour/Tailscale with LAN discovery, supporting dark/light themes and accessibility features. Built with a shared Rust bridge layer for cross-platform code sharing, offering a lightweight mobile interface to Codex.

metadata.name: GithubStarsIndex
metadata.description: 自动抓取 GitHub Stars，生成 AI 摘要，便于检索。

summary.zh: 自动抓取 GitHub Stars 并调用 AI 生成摘要与标签的脚本工具，支持增量同步与并发处理。内置 TAG_MAPPING 标签治理系统自动归一化技术栈术语（如 LLM→AI 大模型），避免标签爆炸。使用 Jinja2 模板生成 Markdown/HTML 静态页，可选同步至 Obsidian Vault 或 GitHub Pages，适合个人知识管理与技术调研。
summary.en: An automated tool that fetches GitHub Stars and generates AI-powered summaries with smart tag normalization. Features incremental sync, concurrent API calls, and a built-in TAG_MAPPING system to consolidate synonyms (e.g., LLM→AI Model). Outputs Markdown/HTML via Jinja2 templates, with optional sync to Obsidian Vault or GitHub Pages—ideal for personal knowledge management and tech research.

metadata.name: openclaw_computer
metadata.description: 一个预装 OpenClaw 并具有桌面环境的 Linux 容器，适配 ModelScope、HuggingFace 等免费容器部署服务，通过浏览器即可畅玩体验 OpenClaw / A Docker container running Debian 12, the KDE desktop environment, and OpenClaw.

summary.zh: 预装 OpenClaw 和 KDE 桌面环境的 Docker 容器，可部署至 ModelScope、HuggingFace 等免费云平台，通过浏览器即可访问类 Windows 的云电脑体验 AI 应用。支持配置自动备份恢复及 S3 远程存储同步，2核16GB 硬件配置适合轻度 AI 工具体验。
summary.en: A Docker container with Debian 12, KDE desktop, and OpenClaw pre-installed, deployable on ModelScope/HuggingFace Spaces. Access a Windows-like cloud desktop via browser, featuring auto backup/restore with S3 support. Ideal for AI tool体验 on 2-core/16GB resources.

metadata.name: omlx
metadata.description: LLM inference server with continuous batching & SSD caching for Apple Silicon — managed from the macOS menu bar

summary.zh: oMLX是专为Apple Silicon优化的本地LLM推理服务器，支持连续批处理与热冷分层KV缓存（内存+SSD），可跨对话持久化上下文。提供菜单栏管理与Web后台，兼容OpenAI API，支持LLM/VLM/Embedding模型及MCP协议，一键部署本地AI推理服务。
summary.en: oMLX is a local LLM inference server optimized for Apple Silicon, featuring continuous batching and tiered KV caching (hot memory + cold SSD) that persists context across conversations. It offers menu bar management and web admin panel, provides OpenAI-compatible API, and supports VLM, embedding models and MCP protocol.

metadata.name: vback
metadata.description: 更方便，更省心：一款开箱即用的服务器备份脚本

summary.zh: vback是一款服务器数据备份Bash脚本，支持S3兼容云存储（AWS S3/R2/OSS/Cloudflare R2等）。单文件部署，菜单式配置，开箱即用。v1.3.0引入备份任务概念，支持多定时任务、实时上传进度显示、SQLite安全备份及压缩上传。一个脚本管理多个备份任务，适合中小型项目做稳定的全量备份。
summary.en: vback is a single-file Bash backup script for server data to S3-compatible cloud storage (AWS S3/R2/OSS/Cloudflare R2 etc.). With one-file deployment and menu-driven configuration, it's ready to use out of the box. v1.3.0 introduces backup task management, multi-schedule support, real-time upload progress, SQLite-safe backup, and compressed uploads. One script manages multiple backup tasks, ideal for stable full backups of small-to-medium projects.

metadata.name: Lumina
metadata.description: Modern web-based control panel for Cloudflare WARP client

summary.zh: Lumina 是一个现代化的 Cloudflare WARP Web 管理面板，支持 usque 和官方客户端双引擎切换，提供连接控制、多节点统一管理、实时日志、安全鉴权等能力。前端 Vue 3 + 后端 FastAPI 全栈设计，支持 Docker 一键部署，适用于网络代理运维与多节点集中管控场景。
summary.en: Lumina is a modern web-based control panel for Cloudflare WARP, supporting dual engines (usque and official client) with one-click switching. It provides connection control, multi-node centralized management, real-time logs, and secure authentication. Built with Vue 3 + FastAPI, deployable via Docker, ideal for network proxy operations.

metadata.name: rime-frost
metadata.description: 白霜拼音：蒹葭苍苍，白露为霜。白霜拼音使用使用745396750字的高质量语料，进行分词，重新统计字频、词频，归一化，打造纯净、词频准确、智能的词库。白霜词库是目前rime方案下最好的开源词库，立志于打造不输于商业输入法的输入体验。

summary.zh: 白霜拼音是基于雾凇词库改进的高质量输入法词库，利用7.45亿字语料重新分词、统计字频词频并归一化，去除冷僻词和废词。支持全拼和双拼，集成Lua辅助码功能，跨平台支持Windows、Mac、Linux、Android、iOS。目标是打造纯净准确、智能开源的rime词库，提供不输商业输入法的输入体验。
summary.en: White Frost Pinyin is a high-quality Chinese input dictionary improved from Wusong Pinyin, using 745M characters of corpus for re-segmentation and frequency normalization. It removes rare words while supporting full pinyin, double pinyin, and Lua auxiliary codes across Windows, Mac, Linux, Android and iOS platforms. Aiming to deliver input experience comparable to commercial input methods.

metadata.name: LDStatusPro
metadata.description: 一款功能强大的 Linux.do 社区增强工具以及相关综合服务开源项目

summary.zh: LDStatus Pro 是专为 Linux.do 和 IDCFlare 社区打造的用户增强工具，基于 Tampermonkey 用户脚本实现信任级别追踪、阅读时间统计与排行榜、云端数据同步、AI 吃瓜助手（帖子总结与问答）、LDC 积分管理及 CDK 面板等核心功能。支持 Chrome/Firefox/Edge/Safari 多浏览器及移动端，采用 OAuth 安全认证和响应式玻璃拟态 UI 设计。
summary.en: LDStatus Pro is a community enhancement tool for Linux.do and IDCFlare forums, built as a Tampermonkey userscript. It offers trust level tracking, reading time statistics with rankings, cloud sync across browsers and devices, AI-powered post summarization with Q&A, LDC points management, and CDK panels. Features OAuth authentication, responsive glassmorphism UI, and cross-platform support.

metadata.name: Surge
metadata.description: Blazing fast TUI download manager built in Go for power users

summary.zh: Surge 是一款用 Go 语言开发的高速 TUI 下载管理器，专为追求效率的高级用户设计。支持多连接并行下载（最多32个连接）、文件分片、多镜像源自动切换和流式顺序下载。采用守护进程架构，可在多个终端标签页中统一管理下载队列，界面美观基于 Bubble Tea 构建。
summary.en: Surge is a blazing-fast TUI download manager built in Go for power users who prefer keyboard-driven workflows. It supports parallel downloading with up to 32 connections, file splitting, multi-mirror failover, and sequential streaming mode. Built on a daemon architecture, it provides a unified download queue across multiple terminal sessions with a beautiful interface using Bubble Tea & Lipgloss.

metadata.name: warp-docker
metadata.description: Run Cloudflare WARP in Docker.

summary.zh: 将 Cloudflare WARP 官方客户端容器化，通过 GOST 代理提供 SOCKS5 和 HTTP 代理服务。支持 WARP+ 订阅密钥、NAT 模式及 L3 流量路由。配置简单，可通过环境变量自定义代理参数和启动延迟，适用于隐私保护和流量转发场景。
summary.en: Containerizes the official Cloudflare WARP client with GOST proxy to provide SOCKS5 and HTTP proxy services. Supports WARP+ subscription, NAT mode, and L3 traffic routing. Easy to configure via environment variables, suitable for privacy protection and traffic forwarding scenarios.

metadata.name: notepad4
metadata.description: Notepad4 (Notepad2⨯2, Notepad2++) is a light-weight Scintilla based text editor for Windows with syntax highlighting, code folding, auto-completion and API list for many programming languages and documents, bundled with file browser plugin matepath.

summary.zh: Notepad4 是基于 Scintilla 的轻量级 Windows 文本编辑器，采用现代 C++ 重写自经典 Notepad2。提供语法高亮、代码折叠、自动补全（支持上下文感知）、多语言 API 列表（100+语言）、书签、Base64 编解码、颜色预览等强大功能。配套 matepath 文件浏览器插件，支持 MSVC/Clang/GCC 多编译器构建，适合开发者日常代码编辑与轻量级编程需求。
summary.en: Notepad4 is a lightweight Scintilla-based text editor for Windows, rewritten in modern C++ from Notepad2. It features syntax highlighting, code folding, context-aware auto-completion, and API lists for 100+ languages. Bundled with matepath file browser plugin, it supports multi-compiler builds (MSVC/Clang/GCC) and offers bookmarks, Base64 encoding/decoding, and color preview via CallTip, ideal for developers' daily coding tasks.

metadata.name: MTranServer
metadata.description: Offline translation model server with low resource consumption, fast speed, and private deployment capability. 低资源占用速度快可私有部署的离线翻译模型服务器

summary.zh: MTranServer 是一款超低资源消耗的离线翻译模型服务器，无需 GPU 即可运行，单请求平均响应时间仅 50ms。支持 Windows/Mac/Linux/Docker 多平台部署及主流语言翻译。通过提供 DeepL、DeepLX、沉浸式翻译等兼容接口，可快速集成到现有翻译工作流，配合 IDE 插件实现代码注释翻译，打造高效的本地化翻译解决方案。
summary.en: MTranServer is an ultra-low-resource offline translation model server that runs without GPU, achieving 50ms average response time per request. It supports cross-platform deployment across Windows, Mac, Linux, and Docker with major language translation capabilities. Compatible with DeepL, DeepLX, and Immersive Translate APIs, it integrates seamlessly into existing workflows with IDE plugins for code comment translation.

metadata.name: Free-NTFS-for-Mac
metadata.description: Nigate: An open-source NTFS utility for Mac. It supports all Mac models (Intel and Apple Silicon), providing full read-write access, mounting, and management for NTFS drives.

summary.zh: Nigate 是一款开源的 Mac NTFS 读写工具，基于 Electron 构建。它为 Intel 和 Apple Silicon Mac 提供完整的 NTFS 分区读写支持，支持设备自动检测、一键挂载为读写模式、状态监控及跨文件系统挂载。工具采用现代深色界面设计，集成自动依赖检查、防休眠及安全重置功能，通过 Ninja Tools 脚本简化复杂操作，适合需要在 Mac 上频繁读写 NTFS 设备的用户。
summary.en: Nigate is an open-source NTFS utility for Mac built with Electron, providing full read-write access for NTFS drives on both Intel and Apple Silicon Macs. It features real-time device monitoring, one-click read-write mounting, and cross-filesystem mounting capabilities. With a modern dark-themed interface, auto dependency checking, sleep prevention, and secure reset functionality, it streamlines NTFS drive management through intuitive GUI and Ninja Tools scripts.

metadata.name: koreader
metadata.description: An ebook reader application supporting PDF, DjVu, EPUB, FB2 and many more formats, running on Cervantes, Kindle, Kobo, PocketBook and Android devices

summary.zh: KOReader是一款专为墨水屏设备打造的开源电子书阅读器，支持PDF、DjVu、EPUB、FB2等数十种格式文档。内置K2pdfopt引擎实现扫描版PDF重排优化，提供calibre无线同步、Wikipedia查词、RSS订阅等丰富功能。支持Kindle、Kobo、掌阅、Android等多平台运行，性能显著优于设备原生阅读器。
summary.en: KOReader is an open-source document viewer optimized for e-ink readers, supporting PDF, DjVu, EPUB, FB2 and many other formats. It features built-in K2pdfopt for reflowing scanned documents, calibre wireless sync, Wikipedia lookup, and RSS feeds. Available on Kindle, Kobo, PocketBook, Android and Linux with superior performance compared to native reading software.

metadata.name: read
metadata.description: 轻阅读一个全移动端可用的阅读应用，支持多端同步阅读进度，适配各种屏幕尺寸。 后端搭建视频教程：https://space.bilibili.com/517034064 ，麻烦一键三连下。

summary.zh: 轻阅读是一款全移动端可用的网络文学阅读应用后端服务，支持Android、iOS、鸿蒙、Windows、macOS等多平台同步阅读进度。采用Docker部署，配备管理后台，支持本地书仓导入、代理功能和自定义包名。通过WebDAV与开源阅读实现进度互通，为小说爱好者提供便捷舒适的跨平台阅读体验。
summary.en: Light Reading is a backend service for a mobile-first web novel reading application supporting cross-platform sync across Android, iOS, HarmonyOS, Windows, and macOS. Deployed via Docker with admin panel, it enables local book source import, proxy functionality, and custom package names. Offers WebDAV integration with open-source readers for seamless reading progress synchronization.

metadata.name: NetMirror
metadata.description: Another Looking-glass Server

summary.zh: NetMirror 是现代化网络诊断 Looking-glass 服务器，采用 Panel + Agent 分布式架构。支持 Ping、iPerf3、MTR、Traceroute、Speedtest 等网络工具，提供实时流量监控与交互式 Shell。Agent 节点通过 Token 一键部署自动注册，适配多架构 Docker 镜像，适合 ISP 和 IDC 向用户提供网络质量可视化诊断服务。
summary.en: NetMirror is a modern looking-glass server with Panel + Agent distributed architecture for network diagnostics. Features include Ping, iPerf3, MTR, Traceroute, Speedtest, real-time traffic monitoring, and interactive shell. Agent nodes auto-register via one-click token deployment with multi-architecture Docker support, ideal for ISPs and CDNs to showcase network quality.

metadata.name: work_crawler
metadata.description: Download comics novels 小说漫画下载工具 小説漫画のダウンローダ 小說漫畫下載:腾讯漫画 大角虫漫画 有妖气 咪咕 SF漫画 哦漫画 看漫画 漫画柜 汗汗酷漫 動漫伊甸園 快看漫画 微博动漫 733动漫网 大古漫画网 漫画DB 無限動漫 動漫狂 卡推漫画 动漫之家 动漫屋 古风漫画网 36漫画网 亲亲漫画网 乙女漫画 webtoons 咚漫 ニコニコ静画 ComicWalker ヤングエースUP モアイ pixivコミック サイコミ;アルファポリス カクヨム ハーメルン 小説家になろう 起点中文网 八一中文网 顶点小说 落霞小说网 努努书坊 笔趣阁→epub.

summary.zh: 一款支持多平台的小说漫画批量下载工具，可将小说转换为epub格式。支持Windows/macOS/Linux系统，提供GUI图形界面、CLI命令行和API三种接口。兼容数十个中日韩漫画小说网站，多语言界面支持简体中文、繁体中文、英文、日语等。
summary.en: A cross-platform tool for batch downloading novels and comics with epub conversion. Supports Windows/macOS/Linux with GUI, CLI and API interfaces. Compatible with dozens of Chinese, Japanese and Korean manga/novel websites, featuring multilingual UI support.

metadata.name: so-novel
metadata.description: 小说下载｜网文下载 | 网络小说

summary.zh: So Novel 是一款通用网页内容提取与导出工具，支持从任意网页抓取结构化数据并转换为 EPUB、TXT、PDF 等电子书格式。项目提供 WebUI、TUI、CLI 三种交互方式，支持 Docker 部署及多平台安装，配备自定义规则引擎，适用于网文采集、资料整理与电子书制作等场景。
summary.en: So Novel is a versatile web content extraction and export tool that scrapes structured data from web pages and converts it to e-book formats like EPUB, TXT, and PDF. It offers WebUI, TUI, and CLI interfaces with cross-platform support including Docker deployment. Featuring a custom rule engine, it excels in web novel collection, data organization, and e-book production.

metadata.name: legado.koplugin
metadata.description: 一个在 KOReader 中阅读 Legado 开源阅读书库的网文阅读插件

summary.zh: 一款专为 KOReader 电子书阅读器设计的 Legado 书库集成插件，支持阅读3.0接口和 reader-server 服务器版。插件提供离线缓存、预下载章节、阅读进度同步、书籍换源及手势快捷操作等功能，显著提升 Kindle、Kobo 等老旧设备浏览网文的流畅度与体验。
summary.en: A KOReader plugin integrating Legado open-source book library, supporting Read 3.0 API and reader-server. Features offline caching, chapter pre-downloading, reading progress sync, book source switching, and gesture shortcuts to enhance web novel reading on older Kindle and Kobo devices.

metadata.name: lnmp
metadata.description: LNMP一键安装包是一个用Linux Shell编写的可以为CentOS/RHEL/Fedora/Aliyun/Amazon、Debian/Ubuntu/Raspbian/Deepin/Mint Linux VPS或独立主机安装LNMP(Nginx/MySQL/PHP)、LNMPA(Nginx/MySQL/PHP/Apache)、LAMP(Apache/MySQL/PHP)生产环境的Shell程序。

summary.zh: LNMP一键安装包魔改版是基于Shell脚本的生产级环境部署工具，支持在CentOS/Debian/Ubuntu及国产系统（银河麒麟/openEuler/UOS）上一键安装LNMP/LNMPA/LAMP架构。魔改版移除官方镜像依赖，所有软件包直连官方源获取，支持多PHP版本共存、Let's Encrypt免费SSL、虚拟主机管理及Redis/Swoole等扩展组件一键安装，适合运维自动化场景。
summary.en: A production-ready Shell-based installer for deploying LNMP/LNMPA/LAMP stacks on Linux VPS or bare-metal servers. This forked version removes official mirror dependencies, fetching all packages directly from upstream sources. Supports numerous Linux distributions including Chinese domestic OS (Kylin/openEuler/UOS), multiple PHP versions, Let's Encrypt SSL, virtual host management, and one-click installation of Redis, Swoole, and other extensions.

metadata.name: WindTerm
metadata.description: A professional cross-platform SSH/Sftp/Shell/Telnet/Tmux/Serial terminal.

summary.zh: WindTerm是一款专业跨平台SSH/Sftp/Telnet/Shell/串口/Tmux终端工具，支持SSH v2、X11转发、端口转发、多因素认证及SFTP/SCP文件传输。兼容Windows、Linux、macOS，内置多语言界面、自动补全、分屏视图和会话管理，完全免费开源。
summary.en: WindTerm is a professional cross-platform SSH/Sftp/Telnet/Shell/Serial/Tmux terminal with SSH v2 support, X11 forwarding, port forwarding, multi-factor authentication, and SFTP/SCP transfer. Available on Windows, Linux, macOS with multi-language UI, auto-completion, split views, and session management. Fully free and open source.

metadata.name: httpsok
metadata.description: 🔥🔥🔥一行命令，轻松搞定SSL证书自动续期。 SSL泛域名证书，SSL证书管理，SSL证书自动续期，SSL证书自动更新，七牛云、阿里云、腾讯云、CDN、OSS、https证书管理,https证书管理,免费SSL证书,TLS证书自动续签,nginx证书自动续期工具，nginx证书管理。从此告别Let's Encrypt

summary.zh: httpsok是一款专业的SSL证书自动续期工具，基于Shell开发，兼容Let's Encrypt泛域名证书。支持Nginx、Apache等主流Web服务器，可自动识别现有证书配置，无需人工干预。支持阿里云、腾讯云、七牛云等多家云厂商的DNS验证，适用于复杂生产环境的HTTPS证书自动化管理需求。
summary.en: httpsok is a professional SSL certificate auto-renewal tool built with Shell, supporting Let's Encrypt wildcard certificates. Compatible with Nginx, Apache and other major web servers, it automatically detects existing certificate configurations. Supports DNS verification for multiple cloud providers including Alibaba Cloud, Tencent Cloud and Qiniu, ideal for automated HTTPS certificate management in complex production environments.

metadata.name: BBLL
metadata.description: 一个第三方哔哩哔哩客户端，A third-party bilibili client。

summary.zh: BBLL是一款开源第三方哔哩哔哩Android客户端，基于官方API封装实现视频播放、搜索、推荐等功能。支持TV与移动双平台，兼容Android 4.4以上系统，采用硬件解码确保流畅播放体验。仅供学习交流使用，无任何破解行为。
summary.en: BBLL is an open-source third-party Bilibili client for Android, encapsulating official APIs to provide video playback, search, and recommendations. Supports both TV and mobile platforms, compatible with Android 4.4+, using hardware decoding for smooth playback. For learning purposes only, no cracking involved.

metadata.name: xbsrebuild
metadata.description: 香色闺阁xbs书源加解密工具

summary.zh: 香色闺阁阅读器的书源格式转换工具，支持xbs加密格式与json明文格式的双向加解密转换。提供Web服务界面便于操作，同时支持命令行批量处理。可将加密书源解密为可编辑json，也可将修改后的json重新加密为xbs格式，方便用户管理和自定义书源。
summary.en: A book source format conversion tool for the Xiangse Guige reader app, supporting bidirectional encryption/decryption between xbs and json formats. Features a web service interface and CLI for batch processing. Decrypt encrypted sources to editable json, or re-encrypt modified json back to xbs format for easy source management and customization.

summary.zh: 微信聊天记录导出与分析工具，支持从微信数据库提取聊天数据生成年度报告。单人/双人年度报告可在线预览，涵盖聊天频率、互动高峰时段等统计维度。核心价值在于让用户真正掌控自己的社交数据，支持数据本地存储与可视化分析。注重隐私保护，倡导"我的数据我做主"理念。
summary.en: A WeChat chat history extraction and analysis tool that retrieves data from WeChat database to generate annual reports. Supports single and dual-user annual reports with online preview, including chat frequency and interaction peak statistics. Core value is enabling users to truly control their social data with local storage and visualization. Emphasizes data privacy and "My Data, My Control" philosophy.

metadata.name: conntrack-top
metadata.description: Show the top source and destination addresses in the nf_conntrack table

summary.zh: Linux 网络连接追踪工具，实时解析 nf_conntrack 内核表，统计 TCP/UDP 协议的源/目标 IP 地址连接数排行。适用于网络故障排查、流量异常检测和系统安全监控，输出简洁的 Top N 排行榜展示高连接量主机。
summary.en: A Linux network connection tracking utility that parses the nf_conntrack kernel table to display the top source and destination IP addresses by connection count for TCP and UDP protocols. Ideal for network troubleshooting, traffic anomaly detection, and security monitoring with a clean Top N ranking output.

metadata.name: FileCodeBox
metadata.description: 文件快递柜-匿名口令分享文本，文件，像拿快递一样取文件（FileCodeBox - File Express Cabinet - Anonymous Passcode Sharing Text, Files, Like Taking Express Delivery for Files）

summary.zh: FileCodeBox 是一款轻量级匿名文件分享工具，通过提取码实现「像取快递一样」的文件获取体验。基于 FastAPI + Vue3 构建，支持拖拽上传、批量文件、文本分享及多存储后端（本地/S3/OneDrive）。内置 IP 频率限制、提取码错误限制、文件自动过期等安全机制，支持 Docker 一键部署、国际化与深色模式，适合临时分享与私有部署。
summary.en: FileCodeBox is a lightweight anonymous file sharing tool enabling express-locker-style file retrieval via passcodes. Built with FastAPI and Vue3, it supports drag-drop uploads, batch files, text sharing, and multiple storage backends (Local/S3/OneDrive). Security features include IP rate limiting, passcode attempt restrictions, and auto-expiration. Docker-ready with i18n and dark mode, ideal for temporary sharing and private deployment.

metadata.name: mtr-database-php
metadata.description: MTR (My traceroute) centralized monitoring dashboard with agent deployment

summary.zh: 基于PHP的MTR（My traceroute）网络诊断集中监控系统，通过在多台主机部署agent自动采集MTR数据，统一存储至MySQL数据库并通过Web仪表板图表可视化展示。系统支持定时任务自动采集、TCP/UDP模式配置、API数据传输，适用于网络运维监控与故障排查场景。
summary.en: A PHP-based centralized monitoring system for MTR (My traceroute) network diagnostics. It enables agent deployment across multiple hosts to automatically collect MTR data, storing results in MySQL with a web dashboard for chart-based visualization. Supports scheduled auto-collection, TCP/UDP modes, and API transmission for network operations monitoring and troubleshooting.

metadata.name: uptime-kuma
metadata.description: A fancy self-hosted monitoring tool

summary.zh: Uptime Kuma 是一款开源自托管监控工具，支持 HTTP/TCP/DNS/Ping 等多种协议监控，提供 20 秒级检测频率，集成 90+ 通知服务（钉钉/Telegram/Slack 等），支持多语言、多状态页面、2FA 双因素认证及 Docker 容器监控，适合个人和小型团队进行服务可用性管理。
summary.en: Uptime Kuma is an open-source self-hosted monitoring tool supporting HTTP, TCP, DNS, Ping, WebSocket, Docker containers and more with 20-second intervals. It integrates 90+ notification services, multi-language support, customizable status pages, and 2FA authentication, ideal for personal and SMB infrastructure monitoring.

metadata.name: backtrace
metadata.description: 三网回程路由测试

summary.zh: 一款针对中国三大运营商（电信、联通、移动）的回程路由测试工具。使用 Go 语言开发，通过脚本一键安装，自动检测服务器到目标节点的回程路由，输出直观的路由类型（CN2、BGP、163 等），帮助运维人员快速评估网络质量与线路优劣。
summary.en: A network diagnostic tool for testing return route quality of China's three major carriers (China Telecom, China Unicom, China Mobile). Built with Go, it automatically detects return route types (CN2, BGP, 163, etc.) via one-command installation, enabling ops teams to quickly assess server network quality and select optimal routes.

metadata.name: source-reader
metadata.description: 香色闺阁桌面版

summary.zh: 基于Tauri + Vue 3 + TypeScript构建的桌面阅读器应用"香色闺阁"源代码。采用Rust后端与Web前端结合，实现轻量级跨平台桌面应用，内置SQLite数据库存储阅读数据，支持小说/图书阅读功能。
summary.en: Desktop reader application "Xiangse Guige" built with Tauri, Vue 3, and TypeScript. This lightweight cross-platform app combines Rust backend with modern web frontend, using SQLite database to store reading data for novels and e-books.

metadata.name: 3D-Printer
metadata.description: Voron Stuff

summary.zh: Voron 开源 3D 打印机的配件、改装件和工具集合。涵盖打印机优化组件、可打印模型及实用工具，支持 Voron 系列机型社区用户的个性化定制与功能扩展。
summary.en: A curated collection of accessories, mods, and tools for Voron open-source 3D printers. Provides optimized components, printable models, and utilities to enhance and customize Voron machines for enthusiasts.

metadata.name: NTrace-core
metadata.description: NextTrace, an open source visual route tracking CLI tool

summary.zh: NextTrace是一款开源的轻量级可视化路由追踪工具，使用Golang开发。它通过CLI界面实时展示网络数据包从源到目的地的完整路由路径，支持多平台自动化安装，提供直观的可视化输出，帮助用户快速诊断网络问题，定位路由故障点。
summary.en: NextTrace is an open-source, lightweight visual routing tool developed in Golang. It provides real-time visualization of network packet routes from source to destination through a CLI interface. Supporting automated installation across multiple platforms, it offers intuitive visual output to help users quickly diagnose network issues and locate routing failure points.

metadata.name: opentrace
metadata.description: Open Source Visualized Route Tracing Tool for macOS, Windows, and Linux.

summary.zh: OpenTrace 是一款开源跨平台可视化路由追踪工具，基于 NextTrace 后端构建。支持 Windows WPF、Linux GTK、macOS 原生 GUI，提供 MTR、TCP/UDP 追踪、自定义 DNS 解析器（DNS/DoH）及本地 MMDB 数据库等进阶功能，多语言界面适配全球用户。
summary.en: OpenTrace is an open-source cross-platform visualized route tracing tool powered by NextTrace backend. It features native GUIs for Windows WPF, Linux GTK, and macOS, offering advanced capabilities including MTR, TCP/UDP traceroute, custom DNS resolvers (DNS/DoH), and local MMDB database support with multilingual interface.

metadata.name: gkd
metadata.description: 基于无障碍，高级选择器，订阅规则的自定义屏幕点击安卓应用 | An Android APP with custom screen tapping based on Accessibility, Advanced Selectors, and Subscription Rules

summary.zh: GKD 是一款基于 Android 无障碍服务的高级屏幕自动化点击应用。通过 CSS 风格的高级选择器精确定位界面元素，支持订阅规则远程更新配置，实现跳过广告、自动确认登录、简化重复操作等场景。需配合快照审查工具定位目标节点，规则可本地管理或订阅社区共享配置。
summary.en: GKD is an Android automation app powered by Accessibility Service with advanced CSS-like selectors for precise UI element targeting. It supports subscription-based remote rule updates to skip ads, auto-confirm logins, and streamline repetitive tasks. Rules can be managed locally or subscribed from community shared configurations, with snapshot inspection for element localization.

metadata.name: reader
metadata.description: 阅读3服务器版，桌面端，iOS可用。后端 Kotlin + Spring Boot + Vert.x + Coroutine ；前端 Vue.js + Element。麻烦点点star，关注一下公众号【假装大佬】❗️

summary.zh: 阅读3服务器版是一款自托管网络文学阅读器，后端基于 Kotlin + Spring Boot + Vert.x + Coroutine 构建，前端采用 Vue.js + Element。支持书源管理、书架管理、搜索换源、听书、漫画、RSS订阅、WebDAV同步及多格式电子书导入。无需手机客户端，桌面端和iOS均可直接访问，适合搭建私人阅读服务。
summary.en: Reader Server Edition is a self-hosted web novel reader built with Kotlin, Spring Boot, Vert.x, and Coroutine on the backend, paired with Vue.js and Element UI on the frontend. It offers book source management, bookshelf organization, search with source switching, text-to-speech, comic support, RSS feeds, WebDAV sync, and multi-format e-book imports. Accessible via desktop and iOS without a mobile client, ideal for personal reading services.

metadata.name: TrackersListCollection
metadata.description: 🎈 Updated daily! A list of popular BitTorrent Trackers! / 每天更新！全网热门 BT Tracker 列表！

summary.zh: 每日更新的热门 BT Tracker 列表集合，提供 best/all/http/nohttp 多种分类版本，覆盖 78-157 个优质 Tracker。通过添加 Tracker 可显著提升 BT 下载速度、连接更多 peer 节点。支持 qBittorrent、Aria2 等主流 BT 客户端使用。
summary.en: A daily-updated collection of popular BitTorrent trackers offering multiple lists (best/all/http/nohttp) with 78-157 quality trackers. Adding these trackers significantly improves BT download speeds by connecting more peers. Compatible with qBittorrent, Aria2, and other major BT clients.

metadata.name: qbittorrent-bot
metadata.description: Telegram bot to mange your qBittorrent torrents

summary.zh: 一款通过 Telegram 远程管理 qBittorrent 种子的机器人，支持查看/添加/管理种子、限速设置、配置导出等常用功能。采用 python-qBittorrent 库对接 WebUI API，支持 Docker 部署，适合家庭树莓派等场景实现 BT 下载的移动端便捷管理。
summary.en: A Telegram bot for remote qBittorrent management via WebUI API. Supports viewing/adding/managing torrents, speed limits, settings export, and permission controls. Docker-ready, ideal for home servers like Raspberry Pi to control BT downloads from mobile devices.

metadata.name: Jsjiemi
metadata.description: 基于正则匹配的 JavaScript 解密工具。请务必遵守开源协议，不得用于非法或商业用途。

summary.zh: 基于正则匹配的JavaScript混淆代码解密工具，通过静态分析还原变量名替换和字符串加密，评估JS代码混淆工具的安全防护能力。项目已停止维护，但代码仍可参考学习。
summary.en: A JavaScript deobfuscation tool using regex pattern matching to restore obfuscated variable names and string encryption. Evaluates the security level of code obfuscation tools. Project discontinued but code remains educational.

metadata.name: Natter
metadata.description: Expose your TCP/UDP port behind full-cone NAT to the Internet.

summary.zh: Natter是一款轻量级NAT穿透工具，通过STUN协议获取公网IP，将全锥型NAT背后的TCP/UDP端口暴露到互联网。支持iptables、nftables、socat等多种内核转发方法，集成UPnP/IGD自动发现与保活机制，确保端口映射长期稳定。零第三方依赖，Python编写，适用于远程访问、P2P连接和私有服务器等场景。
summary.en: Natter is a lightweight NAT traversal tool that uses STUN protocol to obtain public IPs and expose TCP/UDP ports behind full-cone NATs to the Internet. It supports multiple forwarding methods like iptables, nftables, and socat, with built-in UPnP/IGD discovery and keep-alive mechanisms for stable port mappings. Zero third-party dependencies, Python-based, ideal for remote access, P2P connections, and private servers.

metadata.name: nexttrace-experiment
metadata.description: An open source visual route tracking CLI tool (experiment field)

summary.zh: NextTrace Experiment 是一款开源的可视化路由追踪 CLI 工具，采用 Golang 开发。作为实验性分支，该项目旨在提供高度可定制化的 Traceroute 功能，可直观展示网络数据包的传输路径和延迟信息。适用于网络故障诊断、链路分析等场景。
summary.en: NextTrace Experiment is an open-source visual route tracking CLI tool developed in Golang. As an experimental branch, it aims to provide highly customizable Traceroute functionality with intuitive visualization of network packet paths and latency metrics. Ideal for network diagnostics and link analysis scenarios.

metadata.name: plotman
metadata.description: Chia plotting manager

summary.zh: Plotman 是 Chia 区块链的绘图任务管理器，支持在多tmp目录上自动交错启动绘图任务，通过rsync将完成的plots归档至远程农场，支持暂停/恢复/终止任务控制，提供交互式仪表板和命令行工具，采用无状态设计通过日志和进程表追踪状态，确保绘图作业的自动化高效运行。
summary.en: Plotman is a Chia blockchain plotting manager that automatically spawns staggered plotting jobs across multiple temp directories, archives completed plots to remote harvesters via rsync, and provides process control (suspend/resume/kill) with both interactive dashboard and CLI modes. Its stateless architecture relies on process tables and logfiles for state tracking.

metadata.name: http-t-shirts
metadata.description: Open source http status code T shirt  ·  http状态码系列T恤设计稿

summary.zh: 开源HTTP状态码T恤设计项目，提供30个常用状态码（1xx-5xx）的矢量图案，包含SVG和PNG双格式。专为开发者社区设计，风格简洁统一，适合技术聚会、文化衫印刷。项目采用CC-BY协议，允许免费商用但需注明来源。
summary.en: Open-source HTTP status code T-shirt design project featuring 30 common codes (1xx-5xx) in SVG and PNG formats. Designed for the developer community with clean, unified styling suitable for tech events and merchandise printing. CC-BY licensed for commercial use with attribution required.

metadata.name: notion-zh_CN
metadata.description: notion 中文化

summary.zh: notion-zh_CN 是 Notion 的中文本地化工具，支持网页端（油猴脚本）、桌面端（Windows/Mac）和安卓端多平台汉化。采用修改本地化资源文件、注入脚本和本地存储篡改等技术方案，让用户提前使用中文语料界面。项目提供详细的安装指南和自动化方案，涵盖文件注入、热更新修改等核心实现。
summary.en: notion-zh_CN provides Chinese localization for Notion across web (Tampermonkey), desktop (Win/Mac), and Android platforms. It employs techniques like locale resource modification, script injection, and localStorage tampering to enable Chinese UI. The project includes detailed installation guides and automation solutions for file injection and hot-update modification.

metadata.name: nali
metadata.description: An offline tool for querying IP geographic information and CDN provider. 一个查询IP地理信息和CDN服务提供商的离线终端工具.

summary.zh: Nali是一款Go语言编写的离线IP地理信息与CDN提供商查询终端工具。支持纯真、Geoip2、IPIP、ip2region等多家数据库，可管道处理、交互式查询，同时兼容IPv4/IPv6，自动识别输出CDN服务商信息，适合网络诊断与安全分析场景。
summary.en: Nali is an offline CLI tool written in Go for querying IP geolocation and CDN providers. It supports multiple databases including pure-IP, Geoip2, IPIP, and ip2region, offering pipe processing, interactive queries, IPv4/IPv6 support, and CDN provider identification. Ideal for network diagnostics and security analysis.

metadata.name: ant-design
metadata.description: An enterprise-class UI design language and React UI library

summary.zh: 蚂蚁集团开源的企业级React UI组件库，提供60+高质量开箱即用组件。基于TypeScript开发，支持强大的CSS-in-JS主题定制和完整的国际化方案。遵循统一的设计语言规范，帮助团队快速构建美观一致的企业级Web应用，是React生态中最受欢迎的前端UI框架之一。
summary.en: A comprehensive React UI library developed by Ant Group, offering 60+ enterprise-grade components out of the box. Built with TypeScript for predictable static types, it features powerful CSS-in-JS theming and extensive internationalization support. Following a cohesive design language, it helps teams rapidly build visually consistent professional web applications.

metadata.name: ssbc
metadata.description: 手撕包菜网站

summary.zh: 手撕包菜是一个基于DHT网络的BT资源搜索引擎网站。项目采用Node.js构建，包含爬虫和Web两部分，使用MongoDB存储数据，SphinxSearch实现全文检索。爬虫通过监听DHT网络节点获取种子信息，支持磁力链接搜索。2015年使用Django开发，后于2019年改用Node.js重构，代码开源供技术交流。
summary.en: SSBC is an open-source BitTorrent resource search engine based on DHT network crawling. Built with Node.js, it consists of spider and web modules, using MongoDB for storage and SphinxSearch for full-text retrieval. The spider monitors DHT nodes to collect torrent metadata, enabling magnet link search. Originally developed with Django in 2015, it was rewritten with Node.js in 2019 for better performance.

metadata.name: OneClickCDN
metadata.description: A one-click shell script to set up a CDN node for your websites.

summary.zh: 一键Shell脚本，自动从源码编译部署Apache Traffic Server搭建CDN节点。支持Let's Encrypt免费SSL证书、网站管理、缓存清理及配置备份恢复。可在Ubuntu/Debian/CentOS上快速构建类似Cloudflare的CDN集群，支持GeoDNS多节点调度。适合有技术能力的用户自建内容分发网络。
summary.en: A one-click Shell script that compiles Apache Traffic Server from source to deploy CDN nodes. Features include Let's Encrypt SSL support, website management, cache purging, and configuration backup/restore. Runs on Ubuntu/Debian/CentOS to build Cloudflare-like CDN clusters with GeoDNS. Ideal for tech-savvy users to set up self-hosted content delivery networks.

metadata.name: WeChatExtension-ForMac
metadata.description: A plugin for Mac WeChat

summary.zh: macOS微信增强插件，支持消息防撤回（手机同步接收被撤回内容）、多开登录、消息转发、自定义/AI自动回复、小程序查看及多种皮肤模式。采用Objective-C编写，经过两年持续维护，是GitHub上最活跃的微信相关开源项目之一。
summary.en: A feature-rich macOS WeChat plugin enabling message anti-revocation, multi-account login, message forwarding, AI/custom auto-reply, mini-program viewing, and multiple skin themes. Built with Objective-C, maintained for two years, it ranks among the most active WeChat-related open-source projects on GitHub.

metadata.name: RevokeMsgPatcher
metadata.description: :trollface: A hex editor for WeChat/QQ/TIM - PC版微信/QQ/TIM防撤回补丁（我已经看到了，撤回也没用了）

summary.zh: 一款针对Windows平台PC版微信/QQ/TIM的防撤回补丁工具，通过十六进制编辑修改目标DLL文件实现消息防撤回功能，同时支持微信多开。采用.NET Framework开发，杀毒软件可能误报，需放行处理。微信/QQ/TIM更新后需重新应用补丁。
summary.en: A hex patching tool for WeChat/QQ/TIM on Windows that disables message recall by modifying target DLL files. Supports WeChat multi-instance feature. Built with .NET Framework, may trigger false positives from antivirus software. Requires re-patching after software updates.

metadata.name: pinyin
metadata.description: 🇨🇳 基于词库的中文转拼音优质解决方案

summary.zh: PHP中文转拼音库，基于大规模词库精准处理多音字问题。支持声调符号、数字声调、无声调等多种输出格式，涵盖姓氏识别、护照姓名转换等场景。提供句子转拼音、拼音首字母、链接友好字符串等丰富方法，适合构建中文搜索索引、内容URL别名等应用。
summary.en: A PHP library for Chinese to Pinyin conversion, leveraging extensive dictionaries to accurately handle polyphones. Supports multiple tone styles (symbols, numbers, none), surname recognition, and passport name conversion. Offers methods for sentence conversion, initials extraction, and URL-friendly slugs, ideal for search indexing and content routing.

metadata.name: rime
metadata.description: Rime Squirrel 鼠须管配置文件（朙月拼音、小鹤双拼、自然码双拼）

summary.zh: 专为 macOS 鼠须管（Rime 输入法）打造的配置仓库，集成朙月拼音、小鹤双拼、自然码双拼三种方案，内置百万级搜狗词库，支持 Emoji 及时间日期动态输入。提供跨平台词库同步、高度可定制配置，完全开源保护隐私。
summary.en: A comprehensive configuration repo for macOS Rime/Squirrel input method, featuring multiple pinyin schemes (luna_pinyin, flypy, natural code double pinyin) with million-level Sogou dictionary, emoji support, and dynamic date/time input. Offers cross-platform sync, highly customizable, open-source and privacy-respecting.

metadata.name: MadelineProto
metadata.description: Async PHP client API for the telegram MTProto protocol

summary.zh: MadelineProto 是一个功能完整的 PHP 异步 MTProto 协议客户端库，无需依赖官方 Bot API 即可直接与 Telegram 服务器通信。支持手机号登录和机器人令牌认证，提供完整的 Telegram API 访问能力，包括消息发送、频道管理、秘密聊天、故事下载等功能，适用于构建高级 Telegram 用户机器人和自动化工具。
summary.en: MadelineProto is a fully-featured async PHP MTProto protocol client library that enables direct communication with Telegram servers without relying on the official Bot API. Supporting phone number login and bot token authentication, it provides complete Telegram API access including messaging, channel management, secret chats, and story downloads, ideal for building advanced Telegram userbots and automation tools.

metadata.name: WeChatTweak
metadata.description: A command-line tool for tweaking WeChat - 首款微信 macOS 客户端撤回拦截与多开 🔨

summary.zh: 针对微信 macOS 客户端的命令行修改工具，提供消息撤回拦截、多开支持、阻止自动更新三大核心功能。通过 Homebrew 一键安装，执行 patch 命令即可使用。适合需要同时登录多个账号或希望保留撤回消息的用户，是 macOS 微信用户的效率提升利器。
summary.en: A command-line tool for tweaking WeChat macOS client, featuring message withdrawal interception, multiple instance support, and auto-update blocking. Installed via Homebrew and activated with a simple patch command. Ideal for users needing multiple accounts or wanting to preserve recalled messages.

metadata.name: goindex-theme-acrou
metadata.description: This is a goindex theme.一个goindex的扩展主题。

summary.zh: 基于Cloudflare Workers与Google Drive搭建的无服务器文件索引系统，提供美观的多驱动器切换、Markdown/Html渲染及音视频在线播放功能，支持多语言、页面级缓存与自定义视频播放器API，适合个人文件分享或搭建轻量级网盘展示站。
summary.en: A serverless file indexing system built on Cloudflare Workers and Google Drive, featuring multi-drive switching, Markdown/Html rendering, and online audio/video playback with VTT subtitles. Supports multi-language, page-level caching, and custom video player API, ideal for personal file sharing or lightweight cloud storage display.

metadata.name: Mods
metadata.description: Mods can be used to Create or Open/Edit and Generate packages for Synology

summary.zh: Mods是一款Windows桌面应用，用于为Synology NAS创建自定义快捷方式和安装包(.spk)。支持在DSM桌面添加URL链接、Shell脚本执行和Web应用浮窗，支持DSM 6.x/7.x双版本。内置CGI路由器可绕过Web Station依赖，配套完整的安装向导和前后置脚本功能。
summary.en: Mods is a Windows desktop tool for creating custom shortcuts and installation packages (.spk) on Synology NAS. It supports URL links, shell script execution, and floating web apps on DSM desktop, compatible with both DSM 6.x and 7.x. Built-in CGI router eliminates Web Station dependency, with full installation wizard and pre/post scripts.

metadata.name: core
metadata.description: 🔞 JAVClub - 让你的大姐姐不再走丢

summary.zh: JAVClub 是一个已归档的媒体资源管理系统，采用 Node.js 构建后端服务。该系统整合了自动化爬虫（fetcher）、Web 前端（web）和后端核心（core）三个组件，支持从公开站点自动抓取、下载、上传至 Google Drive 存储，并通过流媒体方式在线播放。项目提供多用户系统、收藏夹、邀请注册及公告功能，采用 Docker 容器化部署，代理层使用 Cloudflare Workers 实现跨域资源访问。
summary.en: JAVClub is an archived media resource management system built with Node.js, integrating three components: automated fetcher, web frontend, and core backend. It supports automatic crawling, downloading, and uploading to Google Drive, with streaming playback capability. Features include multi-user system, bookmarks, invitation-based registration, and announcement system. Deploys via Docker with Cloudflare Workers for proxy functionality.

metadata.name: mtr
metadata.description: mtr 增加IP解析功能, a network diagnostic tool

summary.zh: bilibili/mtr 是经典网络诊断工具 traceroute+ping 的增强版本，由B站开源维护。该项目在原生mtr基础上新增IP地理位置解析功能，支持B站IP库和ipip.net两种数据源，可实时显示每个网络跳点的地理位置信息，适用于网络故障排查、路由分析和性能测试等场景。
summary.en: bilibili/mtr is an enhanced fork of the classic network diagnostic tool combining traceroute and ping, open-sourced by Bilibili. It adds IP geolocation parsing on top of native mtr, supporting both BiliIP and ipip.net databases to display geographic location for each network hop. Ideal for network troubleshooting, route analysis, and performance testing.

metadata.name: gd-utils
metadata.description: Google Drive 百宝箱

summary.zh: gd-utils是Google Drive文件管理百宝箱，支持Service Account批量转存以突破单文件5TB限制。内置Telegram Bot交互界面，提供文件统计、目录拷贝、断点续传等功能。可通过Docker、Colab或一键脚本部署，处理数百万级文件并具备内存优化机制。
summary.en: gd-utils is a comprehensive Google Drive toolkit featuring file statistics and bulk transfer via Service Account, bypassing the 5TB single-file limit. It includes a Telegram Bot interface for operations like folder copying and resumable transfers. Supports Docker, Colab, and script-based deployment with memory optimization for millions of files.

metadata.name: BookStack
metadata.description: A platform to create documentation/wiki content built with PHP & Laravel

summary.zh: BookStack是一款开源文档与Wiki平台，基于PHP和Laravel构建，提供直观的可视化编辑器用于创建和管理知识文档。系统支持用户权限管理、多语言本地化及Markdown编辑，适配团队协作写作、技术文档编写及企业内部知识库建设场景，采用MIT许可证发布。
summary.en: BookStack is an open-source documentation and wiki platform built with PHP and Laravel, offering an intuitive visual editor for creating and organizing knowledge documents. It supports user permissions, multilingual localization, and Markdown editing, making it ideal for team collaboration, technical documentation, and internal knowledge base management.

metadata.name: meta-news
metadata.description: A plugin to generate news plugin

summary.zh: Meta News 是一款专为 Here.app 桌面应用设计的新闻插件生成器。用户通过可视化配置即可快速生成自定义新闻源插件，自动显示在桌面窗口中。无需编程基础，一键安装部署，大幅降低插件开发门槛，适合需要个性化桌面新闻阅读体验的用户。
summary.en: Meta News is a plugin generator for Here.app that enables users to create custom news source plugins through visual configuration. With one-click installation and no coding required, users can quickly generate desktop news widgets. It streamlines the plugin development process for personalized news aggregation on desktop environments.

metadata.name: Here-Plugins
metadata.description: Plugins for Here App 🚀

summary.zh: Here-Plugins 是 macOS 生产力应用 Here 的官方插件仓库，支持社区开发者创建和提交自定义插件。插件列表每 24 小时在官网 here.app 同步更新，提供标准化开发文档和社区维护的插件生成器，降低开发门槛。
summary.en: Here-Plugins hosts community-contributed extensions for Here, a macOS productivity app in beta testing. It enables developers to create, package, and submit custom plugins with comprehensive documentation and a community-built generator tool.

metadata.name: any-rule
metadata.description: 🦕  常用正则大全, 支持web / vscode / idea / Alfred Workflow多平台

summary.zh: any-rule收录84条常用正则表达式，覆盖手机号、邮箱、URL、身份证、股票代码、迅雷/磁力链接等常见场景。支持Web、VSCode、IDEA、Alfred Workflow、uTools等多平台，提供关键词搜索和正则可视化图解功能，方便开发者快速查询和理解正则规则。
summary.en: Any-rule is a comprehensive regex library featuring 84+ common patterns for validating phone numbers, emails, URLs, IDs, stock codes, and more. It supports Web, VSCode, IDEA, Alfred Workflow, and uTools platforms, offering search functionality and visual regex explanations to help developers quickly find and understand patterns.

metadata.name: TeleTor
metadata.description: Telegram Torrents Bot

summary.zh: TeleTor是一个Telegram机器人，通过Transmission BitTorrent客户端实现远程torrent管理。用户可在Telegram上发送.torrent文件或magnet链接，自动开始下载，并通过inline按钮启动、停止或删除下载任务。支持在Raspberry Pi等设备上运行，适合家庭NAS或私有服务器场景下远程控制下载。
summary.en: TeleTor is a Telegram bot for remotely managing Transmission BitTorrent client. Users can send .torrent files or magnet links via Telegram to start downloads immediately, with inline buttons for start/stop/delete operations. Designed to run on Raspberry Pi or home servers, solving the pain point of managing torrents in local network through Telegram.

metadata.name: vue-netease-music
metadata.description: 🎵 基于 Vue2、Vue-CLI3 的高仿网易云 mac 客户端播放器（PC） Online Music Player

summary.zh: 基于 Vue2 与 Vue-CLI3 打造的高仿网易云音乐 mac 客户端播放器，完整实现播放、搜索、歌单、MV、主题换肤等功能。采用 CSS Variables 实现动态换肤，better-scroll 处理歌词滚动，workbox 实现 Service Worker 缓存，适合作为 Vue 全家桶实战参考项目。
summary.en: A high-fidelity Netease Cloud Music macOS client built with Vue2 and Vue-CLI3, featuring playback, search, playlists, MV viewing, and theme customization. Uses CSS Variables for dynamic theming, better-scroll for lyrics, and workbox for Service Worker caching. An excellent Vue ecosystem reference project.

metadata.name: magnetW
metadata.description: [已失效，不再维护]

summary.zh: magnetW是一款跨平台磁力链接搜索聚合工具，支持Windows、macOS、Linux。开源免费，集成多源搜索，通过爬虫技术获取资源磁力链接。虽已停止维护，但代码仍具参考学习价值。
summary.en: magnetW is a cross-platform magnet link search aggregator supporting Windows, macOS, and Linux. This open-source free tool aggregates multiple sources using crawler technology. Though discontinued, the code remains valuable for learning purposes.

metadata.name: FictionDown
metadata.description: 小说下载|小说爬取|起点|笔趣阁|导出Markdown|导出txt|转换epub|广告过滤|自动校对

summary.zh: FictionDown 是一款 Go 语言编写的命令行小说爬取工具，支持从起点、笔趣阁等多站点批量采集网络小说。内置广告过滤、自动校对、断点续爬功能，可导出 txt/epub/markdown 等多种格式。采用多线程并发采集，适合数据分析样本采集场景。
summary.en: FictionDown is a CLI novel scraping tool written in Go, supporting batch download from sites like Qidian and Biquge. Features include ad filtering, auto-proofreading, resume capability, and exports to txt/epub/markdown formats with multi-threading support for efficient data collection.

metadata.name: bustag
metadata.description: a tag and recommend system for old bus driver 给老司机用的一个番号推荐系统

summary.zh: Bustag是基于异步爬虫框架aspider构建的智能车牌推荐系统。自动爬取最新车牌信息，用户通过喜欢/不喜欢打标积累数据，训练机器学习模型后自动预测偏好，实现精准过滤与个性化推荐。提供Web界面、Docker部署和多平台支持，降低筛选时间成本。
summary.en: Bustag is an intelligent recommendation system for adult content identifiers, powered by async spider framework aspider. It automatically crawls content, allows user tagging, and employs machine learning models to predict preferences for personalized filtering. Features Web UI and Docker deployment for cross-platform use.

metadata.name: ripe-atlas-software-probe
metadata.description: Probe codebase of RIPE Atlas, a global network measuring Internet connectivity and reachability

summary.zh: RIPE Atlas软件探针代码库是全球分布式互联网测量系统，支持Debian、Enterprise Linux、Raspberry Pi OS等平台。基于C语言开发，提供跨架构（amd64/arm64）二进制包安装。通过部署全球探测器实时采集网络延迟、路由、可达性等指标，为互联网运行状态研究和网络运维提供数据支撑。
summary.en: RIPE Atlas software probe powers a global distributed network measurement system, deploying probes worldwide to measure Internet connectivity and reachability in real time. Built with C, it supports Debian, Enterprise Linux, Raspberry Pi OS across amd64 and arm64 architectures. The probe collects network latency, routing, and reachability metrics for Internet research and infrastructure monitoring.

metadata.name: trackerslist
metadata.description: Updated list of public BitTorrent trackers

summary.zh: 维护公共BitTorrent trackers的开源列表项目，提供117+个经过自动验证的tracker服务器。按性能（最佳/全部）、协议（HTTP/HTTPS/UDP/WebSocket）、网络（I2P/Yggdrasil）分类，支持DNS问题时使用IP版本。每日自动更新，提供多CDN镜像保证可用性。
summary.en: Open-source project maintaining a curated list of 117+ public BitTorrent trackers with automated verification. Classified by performance (best/all), protocol (HTTP/HTTPS/UDP/WS), and network (I2P/Yggdrasil). Includes IP-based versions for DNS troubleshooting. Updated daily with multiple CDN mirrors for reliability.

metadata.name: telegram-sms
metadata.description: An SMS-forwarding Robot Running on Your Android Device.

summary.zh: 一款运行在Android设备上的短信转发机器人，将接收到的SMS文本消息自动转发至Telegram Bot，同时支持来电通知、电池电量监控等功能。通过Carbon Copy机制可配置多个推送渠道（bark、pushdeer、gotify等），并提供聊天命令或短信远程控制设备。最低支持Android 5.1。
summary.en: An SMS-forwarding robot running on Android devices that automatically forwards received SMS text messages to Telegram Bot, with call notifications and battery monitoring. Features Carbon Copy for multi-channel push (bark, pushdeer, gotify) and remote control via chat commands or SMS. Minimum Android 5.1.

metadata.name: CodeNav
metadata.description: Visual Studio extension to show the code structure of your current document

summary.zh: CodeNav是一款Visual Studio代码结构导航插件，实时解析C#文档并以可交互列表展示类、方法、属性等结构。支持点击跳转、光标跟踪、过滤搜索、书签管理及明暗主题，提供代码大纲视图，让开发者在大文件中高效定位与浏览代码。
summary.en: CodeNav is a Visual Studio extension that parses C# documents and displays code structures like classes, methods, and properties in an interactive list. Features include click-to-navigate, cursor tracking, filtering, bookmarks, and light/dark themes, providing an efficient code outline view for navigating large files.

metadata.name: antcolony
metadata.description: Nodejs实现的一个磁力链接爬虫 https://findit.keenwon.com (原域名http://findit.so )

summary.zh: AntColony是基于Node.js的磁力链接爬虫，用于在DHT网络中收集infohash并下载解析种子文件。核心组件包括worker（爬虫）、male（种子下载）、female（数据入库）和queen（入口管理）。通过Redis做消息队列、MongoDB持久化存储、PM2进程管理，实现了高效分布式采集。项目已累计发出15亿次DHT请求，构建磁力搜索引擎findit.keenwon.com的后端数据来源。
summary.en: AntColony is a Node.js-based magnet link crawler that collects infohashes from DHT networks and downloads/parse torrent files. It consists of worker (crawler), male (torrent downloader), female (data persistence), and queen (orchestrator). Using Redis for message queuing, MongoDB for storage, and PM2 for process management, it achieves efficient distributed crawling. The project has sent 15 billion DHT requests to build a magnet search engine backend.

metadata.name: tg-search
metadata.description: Search in Telegram with CJT words (unofficial). Telegram 中文搜索 (非官方).

summary.zh: 非官方Telegram中文搜索工具，解决官方客户端无法搜索中文/日文等非字母语言的问题。通过解析Telegram Desktop导出的HTML聊天记录，在浏览器中实现本地离线全文检索，尤其适合大群聊分页数据的跨页搜索场景。
summary.en: An unofficial Telegram search tool enabling Chinese/Japanese search, addressing Telegram's weakness in non-alphabetic script search. Parses Telegram Desktop's HTML export to provide offline full-text search directly in the browser, ideal for multi-page chat histories in large groups.

metadata.name: instantbox
metadata.description: 📦 Get a clean, ready-to-go Linux box in seconds.

summary.zh: Instantbox 是一个基于 Docker 的即时 Linux 环境生成工具，可在秒级时间内创建干净的 Linux 系统，并通过浏览器 WebShell 快速访问。支持 Ubuntu、CentOS、Debian 等多种发行版，适用于教学演示、临时开发环境搭建、软件测试等场景，无需复杂配置即可获得即用型 Linux 环境。
summary.en: Instantbox is a Docker-based instant Linux environment generator that creates clean Linux systems in seconds and provides browser-based WebShell access. It supports multiple distributions including Ubuntu, CentOS, Debian, Fedora and Alpine. Ideal for educational demos, temporary development environments, and software testing without complex configuration.

metadata.name: phpVideos
metadata.description: php 写的视频下载工具，现已支持：Youku、Miaopai、腾讯、XVideos、Pornhub、91porn、微博酷燃、bilibili、今日头条、芒果TV

summary.zh: PHP编写的跨平台视频批量下载工具，支持微博、B站、腾讯视频、Youku、芒果TV等20+国内外视频平台。提供CLI命令行界面，支持播放列表展示、HTTP代理配置、Cookie/UA自定义，可与aria2集成实现下载加速。需PHP 7.1+环境及FFmpeg支持。
summary.en: A PHP-based multi-platform video downloader supporting 20+ sites including Bilibili, Weibo, Youku, Tencent Video, Douyu, Twitter, and adult platforms like XVideos. Features CLI interface with playlist support, proxy configuration, cookie/UA customization, and aria2 integration for accelerated downloads. Requires PHP 7.1+ with FFmpeg.

metadata.name: TomatoIDC
metadata.description: TomatoIDC/HStack是一款以MIT协议开源销售系统，具备易于扩展的插件系统，模版系统，使用强大的Laravel框架进行驱动，能帮助你轻松的扩展业务。

summary.zh: 基于 Laravel 框架开发的开源在线销售系统，支持插件和模板扩展机制，可用于数字产品、VPS、域名等互联网服务的自动化销售。系统采用 MIT 协议开源，提供支付接口集成能力，具备良好的二次开发友好性，适合中小企业搭建自动化营销平台。
summary.en: An open-source sales platform built on Laravel framework with extensible plugin and template systems, designed for automated selling of digital products like VPS and domains. Licensed under MIT, it offers payment integration and easy customization, suitable for small and medium businesses to build automated sales platforms.

metadata.name: xen-vm-info
metadata.description: Python commandline script to retrieve information about a XenServer VM

summary.zh: Python 命令行工具，用于从 XenServer 虚拟化平台获取虚拟机信息。支持查看所有 VM 详情或按 UUID 精确查询特定虚拟机，可选 DEBUG 模式输出详细日志。附带备份脚本支持存储池中 VHD 配置的保存，适用于 XenServer 环境的高效运维管理。
summary.en: A Python CLI utility for retrieving XenServer virtual machine information. Supports querying all VMs or specific VMs by UUID with optional debug mode for verbose output. Includes a backup script for VHD configurations in storage pools, designed for efficient XenServer operations and management.

metadata.name: DEXBot
metadata.description: Trading Bot for the BitShares Decentralized Exchange

summary.zh: DEXBot是BitShares去中心化交易所的专业量化交易机器人，提供「相对订单」和「交错订单」两种市场做市策略。支持GUI图形界面和CLI命令行模式，可跨平台运行于Windows、Linux、macOS及树莓派。使用Python3开发，支持Docker部署，策略可自定义扩展。
summary.en: DEXBot is a quantitative trading bot for the BitShares decentralized exchange, offering two market-making strategies: Relative Orders for arbitrage and Staggered Orders for set-and-forget volatility trading. Features GUI and CLI modes, cross-platform support, Python3 extensibility, and Docker deployment.

metadata.name: skycaiji
metadata.description: 蓝天采集器是一款开源免费的爬虫系统，仅需点选编辑规则即可采集数据，可运行在本地、虚拟主机或云服务器中，几乎能采集所有类型的网页，无缝对接各类CMS建站程序，免登录实时发布数据，全自动无需人工干预！是网页大数据采集软件中完全跨平台的云端爬虫系统

summary.zh: 蓝天采集器是一款开源免费的可视化网页爬虫系统，通过点选配置即可完成采集规则设计，支持本地、虚拟主机及云服务器多环境部署，跨平台运行。能无缝对接各类CMS建站程序实现免登录实时数据发布，全自动采集无需人工干预，适合网页大数据采集与内容聚合场景。
summary.en: Skycaiji is an open-source web scraper featuring visual point-and-click rule configuration for effortless data extraction. Deployable across local servers, shared hosting, and cloud platforms with full cross-platform support. Seamlessly integrates with CMS systems for login-free real-time data publishing, enabling fully automated collection workflows.

metadata.name: github-trending
metadata.description: 每日github-trending

summary.zh: 自动抓取GitHub Trending热门项目的工具，每日更新并按编程语言分类整理成Markdown文档。支持Python、Swift、JavaScript、Go、Java等12种语言筛选，帮助开发者快速追踪技术趋势和优质开源项目。轻量爬虫实现，可定时运行获取最新行业动态。
summary.en: An automated tool that scrapes GitHub Trending repositories daily, categorizing popular projects by programming language into Markdown format. Supports 12 languages including Python, Swift, JavaScript, Go, and Java, helping developers track technology trends and discover top open-source projects efficiently.

metadata.name: gdrive-copy
metadata.description: Web app to copy a Google Drive folder

summary.zh: Google Drive 文件夹批量复制工具，通过 Google Apps Script 实现递归复制任意有查看权限的文件夹及其全部子目录内容。新文件夹所有权自动转移给执行用户，适合复制团队共享资料或个人备份场景。支持离线运行、共享权限同步，Chrome 扩展形式分发。
summary.en: A Google Drive web app that recursively copies entire folders and subfolders you have view access to. The copied folder becomes your property, making it ideal for duplicating shared organizational content or personal backups. Runs offline via Apps Script with optional sharing permissions sync.

metadata.name: ShanaEncoder
metadata.description: ShanaEncoder，最强的视频压制软件，支持CPU和GPU同时工作，速度快，清晰度高，B站指定压制工具

summary.zh: ShanaEncoder 是一款高性能视频压制工具，支持 CPU 与 GPU 协同编码，可显著提升视频压缩效率并保持高画质。作为 B 站推荐的专业压制软件，它基于 FFmpeg 封装，提供简洁的图形界面，让用户轻松完成高清晰度视频的转码与优化。
summary.en: ShanaEncoder is a high-performance video encoding tool that supports simultaneous CPU and GPU acceleration for faster compression while maintaining excellent quality. Recommended by Bilibili, it wraps FFmpeg with a user-friendly GUI, enabling efficient transcoding and optimization for video uploads.

metadata.name: outline
metadata.description: The fastest knowledge base for growing teams. Beautiful, realtime collaborative, feature packed, and markdown compatible.

summary.zh: Outline是一款基于React和Node.js构建的团队知识库系统，专注于为成长型团队提供快速、协作的知识管理体验。支持实时协同编辑和Markdown文档撰写，采用TypeScript开发，界面美观，支持国际化，可自托管部署，是团队文档沉淀和协作写作的理想工具。
summary.en: Outline is a fast, collaborative knowledge base built with React and Node.js, designed for growing teams to manage documentation. It supports real-time collaborative editing, Markdown-compatible documents, TypeScript throughout, beautiful UI, internationalization, and offers both hosted and self-hosted deployment options for team knowledge management.

metadata.name: VManagePlatform
metadata.description: Kvm  Manage WebUI

summary.zh: VManagePlatform是一款基于Django和Bootstrap的KVM虚拟化管理平台，提供虚拟机全生命周期管理（创建、快照、Web Console）、存储池管理、SDN网络配置（OpenVSwitch/Linux Bridge）及用户权限控制，支持资源利用率监控与在线调整。
summary.en: VManagePlatform is a web-based KVM virtualization management platform built with Django and Bootstrap, offering full VM lifecycle management including resource monitoring, snapshots, Web Console, storage pool management, SDN networking (OpenVSwitch/Linux Bridge), and user access control with Celery task scheduling.

metadata.name: ReSend-SMS
metadata.description: 将手机接收到的短信以邮件的形式发送至指定邮箱

summary.zh: 一款Android短信转发应用，实时捕获手机接收的短信，通过SMTP邮件（SSL加密）自动转发至指定邮箱。支持163/QQ邮箱，使用授权码认证，隐私优先不开云端存储。适合远程监控备用手机、家人手机短信或设备通知。
summary.en: An Android SMS forwarding app that captures incoming text messages and automatically sends them via encrypted SMTP email. Supports 163/QQ mail with auth code authentication, prioritizing privacy by avoiding cloud upload. Ideal for remote monitoring of backup phones or family devices.

metadata.name: MemcacheDos
metadata.description: Memcache 反射DDOS攻击脚本经供学习参考使用

summary.zh: Memcache放大攻击原理演示脚本，利用Memcached UDP协议缺陷实现反射型DDoS攻击。脚本通过set指令预存大段数据，再利用反射技术放大流量。适用于网络安全研究、渗透测试及DDoS防护能力评估，需在合法授权环境下使用。
summary.en: Educational script demonstrating Memcache amplification attack exploiting UDP protocol vulnerabilities. The tool stores large payloads via set commands and leverages reflection techniques for traffic amplification. Designed for cybersecurity research, penetration testing, and DDoS defense evaluation under authorized environments.

metadata.name: KindleEar
metadata.description: Aggregates RSS and web content(Calibre recipe), sends to Kindle, and includes an e-ink optimized online reader.

summary.zh: KindleEar是专为Kindle用户打造的内容聚合推送工具，支持RSS/ATOM/网页内容自动采集，通过Calibre recipe解析并转换为epub/mobi格式，定时推送至Kindle设备。内置AI摘要、双语翻译和文字转语音功能，配备e-ink优化的在线阅读器，支持Docker部署和浏览器插件无代码抓取网页。
summary.en: KindleEar is a content aggregation and delivery tool for Kindle users, automatically collecting RSS/ATOM/web content and converting it to epub/mobi format via Calibre recipe. It features AI summarization, bilingual translation, and text-to-speech. Includes an e-ink optimized online reader, supports Docker deployment and browser extension for code-free web scraping.

metadata.name: netdata
metadata.description: The fastest path to AI-powered full stack observability, even for lean teams.

summary.zh: Netdata 是一个开源的实时基础设施监控平台，支持每秒采集全栈指标，提供 AI 驱动的可视化分析。它兼容 Linux、macOS、FreeBSD 和 Windows 系统，安装极简、资源占用低，可快速检测并预警基础设施、应用和容器层面的性能问题。
summary.en: Netdata is an open-source real-time infrastructure monitoring platform that captures full-stack metrics every second with AI-powered analysis. It supports Linux, macOS, FreeBSD, and Windows, featuring instant deployment and minimal resource footprint to detect performance issues across infrastructure, applications, and containers.

metadata.name: gost
metadata.description: GO Simple Tunnel - a simple tunnel written in golang

summary.zh: GOST是一个用Go语言编写的高性能安全隧道工具，支持HTTP/HTTPS/HTTP2/SOCKS4/SOCKS5/Shadowsocks等多种代理协议，可构建多级代理链实现灵活的网络转发。具备本地/远程TCP/UDP端口转发、透明代理、负载均衡、DNS代理及TUN/TAP设备支持等功能，适用于网络穿透、安全代理和流量转发等场景。
summary.en: GOST is a high-performance security tunnel written in Go, supporting multiple proxy protocols including HTTP/HTTPS/HTTP2/SOCKS4/SOCKS5/Shadowsocks. It features multi-hop proxy chains, TCP/UDP port forwarding, transparent proxy, load balancing, DNS proxy, and TUN/TAP device support, ideal for network penetration and secure traffic forwarding.

metadata.name: aria2-telegram-bot
metadata.description: Telegram bot to control an aria2 daemon

summary.zh: 一个Telegram机器人，用于远程控制aria2下载守护进程。用户可通过Telegram发送命令管理下载任务（添加、启动、停止、删除、查看状态）。基于Python开发，使用diana库与aria2交互，支持systemd服务实现开机自启，适合在树莓派等设备上部署远程下载管理系统。
summary.en: A Telegram bot for remotely controlling the aria2 download daemon. Users can manage downloads via Telegram commands including add, start, stop, remove tasks and check status. Built with Python using the diana library for aria2 interaction, supports systemd service for auto-start on boot. Ideal for Raspberry Pi deployments.

metadata.name: ZBench
metadata.description: 又一个Linux VPS测评脚本

summary.zh: 这是一款集成化的Linux VPS性能测评脚本，融合了Bench.sh和SuperBench的核心功能，并创新加入Ping延迟与路由追踪测试。支持中英文界面，可一键生成包含CPU、内存、磁盘IO、网络速度等完整测试报告，方便VPS用户快速评估服务器性能并分享对比数据。
summary.en: ZBench is an integrated Linux VPS benchmarking script combining Bench.sh and SuperBench features, adding innovative Ping latency and route tracing tests. It supports both Chinese and English interfaces, generating comprehensive reports covering CPU, memory, disk I/O, and network speed with one click, facilitating quick performance evaluation and data sharing.

metadata.name: rclone
metadata.description: "rsync for cloud storage" - Google Drive, S3, Dropbox, Backblaze B2, One Drive, Swift, Hubic, Wasabi, Google Cloud Storage, Azure Blob, Azure Files, Yandex Files

summary.zh: Rclone是云存储同步领域的"瑞士军刀"，支持70+种云存储服务。采用类rsync的命令行界面，实现本地与云端、跨云端之间的文件同步、复制和备份。具备增量同步、加密、缓存、挂载等高级功能，是云迁移和数据管理的首选工具。
summary.en: Rclone is a "Swiss Army knife" for cloud storage, supporting 70+ storage providers. This command-line tool enables file sync, copy, and backup between local and cloud or cross-cloud platforms. With incremental sync, encryption, caching, and mounting features, it's the go-to solution for cloud migration and data management.

metadata.name: cloud-torrent
metadata.description: ☁️ Cloud Torrent: a self-hosted remote torrent client

summary.zh: Cloud Torrent 是一款用 Go 语言编写的自托管远程 BT 下载器。用户可通过 Web 界面远程管理种子任务，文件直接下载到服务器本地磁盘，并支持通过 HTTP 实时流媒体播放或文件检索。单二进制部署、跨平台运行、配备实时状态更新与移动端适配。
summary.en: Cloud Torrent is a self-hosted remote torrent client written in Go. It allows users to manage torrent downloads remotely via a web interface, with files stored locally on the server and accessible via HTTP streaming or direct retrieval. Features include a single binary, cross-platform support, real-time updates, and mobile-friendly UI.

metadata.name: PowerDNS-Admin
metadata.description: A PowerDNS web interface with advanced features

summary.zh: PowerDNS-Admin是一个功能完善的PowerDNS Web管理界面，提供正向/反向DNS区域管理、区域模板、基于角色的访问控制（RBAC）和活动日志。支持多种认证方式（本地、SAML、LDAP、OAuth）和双因素认证(TOTP)，内置PDNS服务配置、统计监控和完整API接口，支持Docker部署，适用于企业级DNS集中运维管理。
summary.en: PowerDNS-Admin is a comprehensive PowerDNS web interface offering forward/reverse DNS zone management, zone templating, and role-based access control. It supports multiple authentication methods (Local, SAML, LDAP, OAuth) and TOTP two-factor authentication, along with PDNS service configuration, statistics monitoring, and RESTful API. Docker deployment is available for enterprise DNS operations management.

metadata.name: snidump
metadata.description: This is a tcpdump-like program for printing TLS SNI and HTTP/1.1 Host fields in live or captured traffic.

summary.zh: 类似tcpdump的网络抓包工具，专注于提取TLS握手中的SNI字段和HTTP/1.1请求的Host头。支持实时网卡抓包（混杂模式）和PCAP文件离线分析，默认过滤80/443端口TCP流量，可输出至PCAP文件。适用于网络监控、安全审计和域名访问统计等场景。
summary.en: A tcpdump-like packet analyzer that extracts Server Name Indication (SNI) from TLS ClientHello messages and Host header from HTTP/1.1 requests. Supports live network interface capture with promiscuous mode or offline PCAP analysis, with default BPF filtering for ports 80/443. Ideal for network monitoring, security auditing, and domain access statistics.

metadata.name: atomiadns
metadata.description: Atomia DNS

summary.zh: Atomia DNS 是一个多租户 DNS 管理系统，专为大规模 DNS 数据处理设计，通过程序化接口实现自动化管理。系统内置 PowerDNS 和 Bind-DLZ 同步代理，支持命令行、Web 应用及 Zone 文件导入等多种管理客户端，适用于需要集中管理多个域名服务器场景的网络基础设施。
summary.en: Atomia DNS is a multi-tenant DNS management system designed for handling large-scale DNS data through programmatic interfaces. It includes sync agents for PowerDNS and Bind-DLZ, with multiple management clients like CLI, web app, and zone file import tools, suitable for centralized nameserver management across multiple tenants.

metadata.name: DNS
metadata.description: The aim of this project is to create abstract object representations of DNS records in PHP. The project consists of various classes representing DNS objects (such as Zone, ResourceRecord, and various RData types), a parser to convert BIND style text files to the PHP objects, and builders to create aesthetically pleasing BIND records.

summary.zh: 纯PHP编写的DNS库，提供Zone、ResourceRecord等DNS对象的面向对象抽象表示。支持解析和生成BIND风格zone文件，可处理A、AAAA、MX、NS、SOA等主流记录类型。内置AlignedBuilder生成格式美观的zone文件输出，便于构建DNS客户端/服务端平台和自动化zone管理。
summary.en: A PHP library providing abstract object representations of DNS records. It parses and generates BIND-style zone files with support for common record types like A, AAAA, MX, NS, and SOA. Features DNS message encoding/decoding capabilities and aesthetically formatted output via AlignedBuilder, enabling pure-PHP DNS client/server platform development.

metadata.name: DNSmasqWeb
metadata.description: 基于DNSmasq的DNS解析、以及DHCP地址分配系统

summary.zh: 基于 DNSmasq 的轻量级 DNS 解析与 DHCP 地址分配 Web 管理系统。Python/Tornado 构建可视化控制台，MySQL 存储配置数据，支持域名解析、DHCP 动态分配及静态地址绑定，提供统一的资源管理界面，适用于机房、办公内网等场景。
summary.en: A lightweight DNS and DHCP management system built on DNSmasq. Features a Python/Tornado web interface with MySQL backend, enabling visual management of DNS resolution, DHCP dynamic allocation, and static IP bindings. Designed for internal networks in data centers, offices, and home environments.

metadata.name: RyShop
metadata.description: 一套基于 PHP 自娱自乐的虚拟主机售卖系统/在线商城

summary.zh: 基于PHP开发的轻量级虚拟主机售卖与在线商城系统，支持商品展示、订单管理、用户注册等核心电商功能。专为虚拟主机环境优化，部署简单，适合个人或小型业务快速搭建在线销售平台。
summary.en: A lightweight PHP-based virtual hosting sales and online shopping system featuring product display, order management, and user registration. Optimized for shared hosting environments with easy deployment, suitable for individuals or small businesses to quickly build online sales platforms.

metadata.name: ItChat
metadata.description: 微信个人号接口、微信机器人及命令行微信，Command line talks through Wechat

summary.zh: itchat 是一个开源的微信个人号 Python 接口，通过不到 30 行代码即可构建处理文本、图片、语音、文件等多种消息类型的微信机器人。支持消息自动回复、用户搜索、群聊管理及命令行二维码登录等核心功能，适用于个人号自动化运营、消息聚合或聊天机器人开发场景。
summary.en: itchat is an open-source WeChat personal account API for Python. With under 30 lines of code, you can build a WeChat robot handling TEXT, PICTURE, VIDEO, FILE, and other message types. Features include auto-reply, user search, group chat management, and terminal QR code login, ideal for personal account automation or chatbot development.

metadata.name: Shadowrocket-ADBlock-Rules
metadata.description: 提供多款 Shadowrocket 规则，带广告过滤功能。用于 iOS 未越狱设备选择性地自动翻墙。

summary.zh: 面向iOS未越狱设备的Shadowrocket翻墙规则集，基于GFWList和EasyList自动生成。提供黑名单、白名单、国内外划分等多种代理模式，支持网页广告、App广告和视频广告过滤。规则采用DFA搜索树高效匹配，不影响上网速度。项目已停止更新但规则仍可使用。
summary.en: A comprehensive Shadowrocket rule set for iOS non-jailbroken devices, auto-generated from GFWList and EasyList. Offers blacklist, whitelist, and region-based proxy modes with ad blocking for web pages, apps, and videos. Uses DFA search tree for efficient matching with zero performance impact. No longer maintained but still functional.

metadata.name: speedtest
metadata.description: Self-hosted Speed Test for HTML5 and more. Easy setup, examples, configurable, mobile friendly. Supports PHP, Node, Multiple servers, and more

summary.zh: LibreSpeed是一款轻量级自托管网络速度测试工具，基于纯HTML5/JavaScript实现，无需Flash、Java或WebSocket。采用XMLHttpRequest和Web Workers技术，支持下载/上传速度、延迟、抖动及IP信息检测。可选遥测数据收集和结果分享功能，提供PHP/Go/Rust/Node.js等多种后端实现，支持MySQL/PostgreSQL/SQLite等数据库，兼容IE11至现代浏览器及移动端，提供Docker部署方案。
summary.en: LibreSpeed is a lightweight self-hosted speed test solution built with pure HTML5/JavaScript, requiring no Flash, Java, or WebSocket. It uses XMLHttpRequest and Web Workers to measure download/upload speeds, latency, and jitter with optional telemetry. Supports multiple backends (PHP/Go/Rust/Node.js) and databases (MySQL/PostgreSQL/SQLite), compatible across IE11 to modern browsers with mobile support and Docker deployment.

metadata.name: antd-admin
metadata.description: An excellent front-end solution for enterprise applications built upon Ant Design and UmiJS

summary.zh: 基于 Ant Design 6 + Umi 4 + TypeScript 构建的企业级管理后台模板，采用 Zustand 轻量状态管理，内置本地 Mock 服务器实现前后端解耦开发。提供 Dashboard、数据可视化、用户管理、菜单配置等完整示例，并支持 AI Chat 功能演示。CI/CD 配置开箱即用，适合快速启动企业级后台项目。
summary.en: A lightweight, enterprise-grade admin template built with Ant Design 6, Umi 4, and TypeScript. It uses Zustand for state management and includes a built-in mock server for backend-independent development. Features Dashboard, data visualization, user management, dynamic routing, and an AI Chat demo. Pre-configured GitHub Actions for CI/CD ready deployment.

metadata.name: ppts_for_php2017
metadata.description: 2017 第三届PHP全球开发者大会PPT/Keynote

summary.zh: 本仓库收录2017年第三届PHP全球开发者大会的演讲PPT资源，汇聚多位技术专家的前沿分享，涵盖PHP新特性、架构设计、性能优化等核心议题，为PHP开发者提供宝贵的学习与交流素材，推动PHP技术生态发展。
summary.en: This repository aggregates presentation slides from the 3rd PHP Global Developer Conference 2017, featuring expert talks on PHP innovations, architecture design, and performance optimization. It serves as a valuable knowledge hub for PHP developers to learn and exchange ideas.

metadata.name: react-antd-admin
metadata.description: 用React和Ant Design搭建的一个通用管理后台

summary.zh: 基于React和Ant Design的通用后台管理框架，通过配置文件驱动界面生成，大幅简化后端人员的前端开发工作。核心提供DBTable通用CRUD组件，定义schema即可快速实现数据表的增删改查、导入导出等功能。支持菜单路由、登录校验、单点登录等配置化开发，并配套后端接口规范，实现前后端分离的快速开发模式。
summary.en: A universal admin dashboard framework built with React and Ant Design, featuring configuration-driven UI generation to reduce frontend workload for backend developers. The core DBTable component enables rapid CRUD implementation through schema definitions, supporting data operations like import/export. It offers configurable menu routing, authentication, and provides standardized backend API specs for efficient full-stack development.

metadata.name: awesome-pcaptools
metadata.description: A collection of tools developed by other researchers in the Computer Science area to process network traces. All the right reserved for the original authors.

summary.zh: awesome-pcaptools 是一个精心整理的网络流量分析工具列表，汇集了 Linux 命令、流量捕获、流量分析与检查、DNS 工具、文件提取等多个类别的开源工具。涵盖带宽监控、网络抓包、协议解析等场景，为网络研究者和安全工程师提供一站式工具索引资源。
summary.en: awesome-pcaptools is a curated collection of open-source tools for network traffic analysis, encompassing Linux commands, traffic capture, inspection utilities, DNS tools, and file extraction capabilities. It covers bandwidth monitoring, packet sniffing, and protocol analysis, serving as a comprehensive resource index for network researchers and security engineers.

metadata.name: phonedata
metadata.description: 手机号码归属地信息库、手机号归属地查询   phone.dat 最后更新：2023年02月

summary.zh: 中国手机号归属地信息库，包含49万+号段记录，数据更新至2023年2月。基于Go语言实现，采用高效二进制数据格式存储，通过二分查找实现极速查询，单次耗时仅152.5纳秒。支持库调用和命令行工具，被360等知名企业采用，并提供Python、Java、Node等多语言实现版本。
summary.en: A comprehensive Chinese mobile phone number location database with 497K+ number segments updated to February 2023. Built in Go with binary search algorithm, achieving 152.5ns per query. Offers both library API and CLI tools. Adopted by companies like 360, with implementations available in Python, Java, Node, PHP, Rust, and other languages.

metadata.name: Scout
metadata.description: 可能是东半球最灵活的 URL 监控系统

summary.zh: Scout 是一款高度灵活的 URL 监控系统，支持自定义 HTTP 请求与 JavaScript 代码编写检测条件，实现精确的响应状态码、响应时间和内容检测。具备活跃时间段、异常容忍、Apdex 等高级功能，提供可视化界面与批量管理，适用于网站/API 可用性监控的运维场景。
summary.en: Scout is a highly flexible URL monitoring system supporting custom HTTP requests and JavaScript-based detection conditions for precise response validation. It offers advanced features like active time periods, anomaly tolerance, and Apdex scoring, combined with a visual interface and batch management for website/API uptime monitoring.

metadata.name: HelloGitHub
metadata.description: :octocat: 分享 GitHub 上有趣、入门级的开源项目。Share interesting, entry-level open source projects on GitHub.

summary.zh: HelloGitHub 是一个开源项目推荐平台，每月28号发布月刊精选GitHub上有趣、入门级的开源项目。内容涵盖有趣项目、开源书籍、实战案例和企业级项目，帮助开发者快速发现优质开源资源，降低学习门槛，感受开源魅力。采用Markdown存储内容，社区驱动贡献，现已发布119期。
summary.en: HelloGitHub is a monthly curation platform sharing interesting and entry-level open source projects from GitHub. Published on the 28th of each month, it covers fun projects, open source books, hands-on examples, and enterprise-grade projects. With 119 issues released, it helps developers discover quality open source resources and embrace the open source community culture.

metadata.name: Monitoring
metadata.description: Monitoring na dostupnost webů, generování feedů, DNS, HTTPS atd.

summary.zh: 这是一个由Peckadesign开发的开源网站监控工具，支持HTTPS证书、DNS解析、RabbitMQ队列状态、文件时效性等多维度检查。采用GitHub OAuth进行身份认证，提供Docker一键部署方式，可对多个Web项目进行集中监控并生成可用性报告，适合运维团队使用。
summary.en: An open-source web monitoring tool from Peckadesign that checks website availability, HTTPS certificates, DNS records, RabbitMQ queues, and file freshness. Features GitHub OAuth authentication and Docker deployment support for centralized monitoring of multiple web projects with customizable checks.

metadata.name: srs
metadata.description: SRS is a simple, high-efficiency, real-time media server supporting RTMP, WebRTC, HLS, HTTP-FLV, HTTP-TS, SRT, MPEG-DASH, and GB28181, with codec support for H.264, H.265, AV1, VP9, AAC, Opus, and G.711.

summary.zh: SRS（Simple Realtime Server）是一款高性能实时媒体服务器，支持RTMP、WebRTC、HLS、HTTP-FLV、SRT、MPEG-DASH、GB28181等主流流媒体协议，兼容H.264/H.265/AV1/VP9视频编码和AAC/Opus/G.711音频格式。具备低延迟转码、多协议转换、DVR录制及集群部署能力，广泛应用于直播、监控、会议及在线教育场景。
summary.en: SRS (Simple Realtime Server) is a high-performance real-time media server supporting RTMP, WebRTC, HLS, HTTP-FLV, SRT, MPEG-DASH, and GB28181 protocols, with codecs including H.264/H.265/AV1/VP9 and AAC/Opus/G.711. It offers low-latency transcoding, multi-protocol conversion, DVR recording, and clustering for live streaming, surveillance, video conferencing, and online education.

metadata.name: ping
metadata.description: 这是一个网页状态监控项目

summary.zh: 基于Laravel开发的网站状态监控系统，支持定时检测网页可用性。采用计划任务实现周期性监控，队列任务异步处理检测请求，可批量监控多站点并支持告警通知。适用于运维监控和网站可靠性保障场景。
summary.en: A web status monitoring system built with Laravel framework. It schedules periodic checks for website availability and uses queue workers to asynchronously process monitoring requests. Supports batch monitoring of multiple sites with alert notifications. Ideal for DevOps monitoring and ensuring website reliability.

metadata.name: Tbo
metadata.description: 一个更轻巧的 Telegram Bot 框架

summary.zh: Tbo 是一个基于 PHP 的轻量级 Telegram Bot 开发框架，采用模块化架构设计，依赖 MySQL 数据库存储数据。框架内置 Web 管理后台，支持插件扩展，适合快速构建 Telegram 聊天机器人和自动化工具。
summary.en: Tbo is a lightweight PHP framework for Telegram Bot development with modular architecture and MySQL backend. It features a built-in web admin panel and plugin system, enabling rapid development of Telegram chatbots and automation tools.

metadata.name: pubuim-zabbix-Incoming
metadata.description: 为 pubu.im 使用的 Zabbix 报警脚本

summary.zh: 这是一个 Zabbix 监控系统的 Python 报警脚本，实现与 pubu.im（即时通讯平台）的消息集成。通过 Webhook 机制将 Zabbix 告警事件自动推送到零信团队频道，支持 Trigger 状态、主机名、Item 值等关键信息同步，提升运维告警响应效率。
summary.en: A Python-based Zabbix alerting script that integrates with pubu.im instant messaging platform via Webhook. It automatically pushes Zabbix trigger events including host status, severity, and item values to PubuIM channels, enhancing operational alert response efficiency through real-time notification delivery.

metadata.name: ngx_lua_waf
metadata.description: ngx_lua_waf是一个基于lua-nginx-module(openresty)的web应用防火墙

summary.zh: ngx_lua_waf是一款基于OpenResty的高性能Web应用防火墙，专为Nginx设计。实现SQL注入、XSS、SSRF等Web攻击防护，支持敏感文件泄露检测、扫描器屏蔽、CC攻击频率限制及IP黑白名单功能。采用Lua实现，轻量级且易于部署，规则文件可灵活配置更新。
summary.en: ngx_lua_waf is a high-performance Web Application Firewall built on OpenResty for Nginx servers. It provides protection against SQL injection, XSS, SSRF attacks, sensitive file leakage, scanner blocking, CC attack rate limiting, and IP blacklist/whitelist management. Lightweight, Lua-based, and easy to deploy with configurable rule files.

metadata.name: nilavu
metadata.description: Open Source Cloud Management Platform - VM's, Docker, Containers, Applications on the go

summary.zh: Nilavu是面向托管行业的开源云管理平台前端，基于Rails 4.2与Ember.js构建。提供虚拟机、Docker容器及应用的秒级部署能力，支持一键启动Bitnami应用商店应用和Docker镜像。企业版集成WHMCS计费系统，支持多区域集群管理与容器编排（Swarm/Rancher），可构建DigitalOcean类私有云解决方案。
summary.en: Nilavu is an open-source cloud management platform UI for the hosting industry, built with Rails 4.2 and Ember.js. It enables one-click deployment of VMs, Docker containers, and applications within seconds, supporting Bitnami apps and Docker registries. Enterprise edition integrates WHMCS billing, multi-region clusters, and container orchestration (Swarm/Rancher) for building private DigitalOcean-like clouds.

metadata.name: freecodecamp.cn
metadata.description: 随着FCC中文社区的快速发展和更多小伙伴的崛起，此项目已从个人项目升级到团队项目。详情请移步：

summary.zh: FreeCodeCamp中文社区开源项目，一个致力于降低编程学习门槛的中文在线教育平台。通过协作翻译消除英文障碍，让更多中文用户能免费获取优质编程教育资源。强调「自举」理念——学习者可参与平台建设，形成良性开源生态。
summary.en: FreeCodeCamp Chinese Community is an open-source online education platform that lowers barriers to programming learning. Through collaborative translation, it eliminates English language obstacles, enabling more Chinese users to access quality programming education resources for free. It emphasizes the 'bootstrapping' concept—learners can contribute to platform development, creating a sustainable open-source ecosystem.

summary.zh: LookingGlass是网络路由查询服务，允许用户远程查看traceroute、ping等路由信息。该项目为PHP实现，支持结果逐行输出（需Nginx 1.5.6+），集成17MON免费IP库提供IP归属地查询。多节点部署于东京、费利蒙、莫斯科、北京等地，适用于ISP、VPS服务商及网络运维人员，便于用户了解网络状况和故障排查。
summary.en: LookingGlass is a network routing query service enabling remote viewing of traceroute, ping and routing information. Built with PHP, it supports chunked output for real-time results via Nginx 1.5.6+. Includes 17MON IP database for geolocation. Deployed across Tokyo, Fremont, Moscow, and Beijing nodes. Ideal for ISPs, VPS providers and network operations to help users diagnose connectivity issues.

metadata.name: awesome-adb
metadata.description: ADB Usage Complete / ADB 用法大全

summary.zh: ADB（Android Debug Bridge）命令的全面用法指南，涵盖设备连接管理、应用安装卸载与调试、文件传输、日志分析、系统设置修改、屏幕截图录制、性能压测及刷机等核心功能。是 Android 开发测试人员、设备玩家及运维人员不可或缺的命令行工具参考手册，支持多种连接方式与场景下的自动化操作。
summary.en: A comprehensive guide to Android Debug Bridge (ADB) commands covering device connection management, app installation/debugging, file transfer, log analysis, system settings modification, screen capture/recording, performance testing, and ROM flashing. An essential reference for Android developers, testers, device enthusiasts, and DevOps engineers with extensive command examples for various scenarios.

metadata.name: shudong-share
metadata.description: 树洞外链

summary.zh: 树洞外链是一款免费开源的PHP外链网盘系统，界面简洁友好。支持七牛云、本地存储、远程存储、阿里云OSS、又拍云五种储存方式，具备多用户管理和多上传策略功能。适用于个人或团队搭建私有外链分享平台，支持GPL V3开源协议。
summary.en: Shudong-share is a free open-source PHP file sharing and link hosting system with a clean, user-friendly interface. It supports five storage backends: Qiniu Cloud, local storage, remote storage, Aliyun OSS, and UPYun. Features include multi-user management and multiple upload strategies, ideal for building private link-sharing platforms.

metadata.name: finalspeed
metadata.description: 高速双边加速软件,在高丢包,延迟环境下仍可达到90%物理带宽利用率.

summary.zh: 高速双边网络加速工具，专为高丢包、高延迟恶劣网络环境设计。通过优化传输算法和拥塞控制策略，实现物理带宽90%利用率。适用于跨国传输、游戏加速等场景，支持TCP/UDP协议优化。
summary.en: High-speed dual-ended network acceleration tool optimized for high packet loss and latency environments, achieving 90% physical bandwidth utilization. Ideal for cross-border transfers and gaming acceleration with advanced TCP/UDP optimization.

metadata.name: guzzle
metadata.description: Guzzle, an extensible PHP HTTP client

summary.zh: Guzzle 是 PHP 语言中最流行的 HTTP 客户端库，提供简洁接口发送 HTTP 请求并与 Web 服务轻松集成。支持同步和异步请求，遵循 PSR-7 接口规范并支持 PSR-18 互操作。中间件系统允许灵活扩展功能，抽象传输层设计使其不依赖特定底层实现。广泛用于 API 调用和微服务通信场景。
summary.en: Guzzle is the most popular PHP HTTP client library, offering a clean interface to send HTTP requests and integrate with web services effortlessly. It supports both synchronous and asynchronous requests, adhering to PSR-7 interfaces and PSR-18 interoperability. The middleware system enables flexible behavior extension, while abstracted transport layer removes dependencies on specific implementations like cURL.

summary.zh: py-kms 是用 Python 实现的 KMS（密钥管理服务）服务器，模拟微软官方 KMS 进行软件激活。支持 Windows 7/8/8.1/2008R2/2012/2012R2 及 Office 2010/2013 的 V4/V5/V6 协议请求。采用 Python 2.7.x 开发，可作为 KMS 协议实现的参考示例。
summary.en: py-kms is a Python-based KMS (Key Management Service) server implementation that simulates Microsoft's official KMS for software activation. It supports Windows 7/8/8.1/2008R2/2012/2012R2 and Office 2010/2013 with V4/V5/V6 protocol requests. Built with Python 2.7.x as a reference implementation of the KMS protocol.

summary.zh: SoSearch 是一个基于 Rust 的高性能伪搜索引擎 API，集成了 DuckDuckGo、Yahoo 和 Brave 三大搜索引擎，通过 rquest 库的 TLS 指纹伪装技术绕过反爬机制。支持 HTTP API 和 MCP 服务器两种运行模式，可作为 AI 智能体的 Web 搜索工具。采用 Tokio 异步运行时实现并发请求，性能优异。
summary.en: SoSearch is a lightning-fast pseudo web search API built in Rust, multiplexing DuckDuckGo, Yahoo, and Brave Search engines with TLS fingerprinting to bypass bot detection. It operates as both an HTTP API and MCP server for AI agents, powered by Tokio async runtime for concurrent requests. A free alternative to SerpAPI/Tavily.
